extraction_notes: Reviewed for overreach against memo. Preserved dual-parent hierarchy for Developer Tier (Foundry + AIP) and parent-child relationship for Industry Operating Systems under Foundry as memo explicitly supports these structures. Added missing revenue model edges for Industry Operating Systems (licensing, service fees) which were explicitly stated in the offering block but omitted in initial compilation. Retained segment-level channel distribution as memo primarily anchors channels to segments. Omitted cloud partnerships channel as non-canonical. No other overreach identified; structure is defensible.
